---
format:
  revealjs:
    self-contained: true
    width: 900
    height: 450
filters:
  - timeline
---

## `.fragment-slide` pan mode {.smaller}

::: {.timeline .horizontal .fragment-slide}
::: {.event data-label="2019"}
**Idea Born**
Napkin sketch becomes a roadmap.
:::
::: {.event .fragment data-label="2020"}
**Project Started**
Initial concept and planning phase.
:::
::: {.event .fragment data-label="2021"}
**First Release**
Launched version 1.0 to early users.
:::
::: {.event .fragment data-label="2022"}
**Major Update**
Rewrote core engine for performance.
:::
::: {.event .fragment data-label="2023"}
**Scale Up**
Reached 1 million users worldwide.
:::
::: {.event .fragment data-label="2024"}
**Going Global**
Expanded to 50 countries.
:::
:::

## `.fragment-conveyor` pan mode {.smaller}

::: {.timeline .horizontal .fragment-conveyor}
::: {.event data-label="2019"}
**Idea Born**
Napkin sketch becomes a roadmap.
:::
::: {.event .fragment data-label="2020"}
**Project Started**
Initial concept and planning phase.
:::
::: {.event .fragment data-label="2021"}
**First Release**
Launched version 1.0 to early users.
:::
::: {.event .fragment data-label="2022"}
**Major Update**
Rewrote core engine for performance.
:::
::: {.event .fragment data-label="2023"}
**Scale Up**
Reached 1 million users worldwide.
:::
::: {.event .fragment data-label="2024"}
**Going Global**
Expanded to 50 countries.
:::
:::
